description.unified: Deals ??? M.DMG to [3->2] enemy, knocks them back, and engraves [Judgment Mark] for 15sec. [Judgment Mark]: M.DMG taken is increased by [25%->15%].

Deals ??? M.DMG 3 times to enemies in a frontal line. [Judgment Mark]: Deals ??? additional M.DMG 3 times, reduces Healing by [50%->30%] for [10 sec->7sec]. This additional damage gains 500 extra DEF Penetration.
Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in range and silences them for [5 sec->2sec]. Then, for 5sec, all allies gain Magic Damage Immunity. [Judgment Mark]: M.DMG taken is increased by [50%->40%] for 5sec.

When using a skill, triggers an additional effect on enemies with [Judgment Mark]. Also, once per battle, when taking fatal damage, gains [Death Resistance], deals ??? M.DMG to enemies with [Judgment Mark], and stuns them for [3 sec->1.2sec]. Then, for 5sec, grants all allies a shield that absorbs ??? damage and increases Status Resistance by [(added) 600]. [Death Resistance]: Ignores fatal damage, but consumes all Mana and increases the remaining cooldown of all skills by 50%. [Judgment Mark]: Every 15sec, deals ??? M.DMG. This damage gains 500 extra DEF Penetration.

light.unified: Mana cost is reduced by 1000 [(removed) Recovers 500 Mana upon a Critical Hit].

description.unified: [Celestial Arrow] Increases DMG by {0}% and the number of targets by [1->2].
[Purifying Light] Reduces Mana Cost by [1->1000] and increases DMG by {0}%.
[Arbiter] Increases DMG by {0}% and increases all allies' ATK by [30%->25%] for the duration of M.Shield.
[The Last Judgment] Upon taking fatal DMG, heals all allies for 15% of Max HP and silences all enemies for {0} sec.
Every 10 sec, applies [Judgment Mark] to a random enemy for [15 sec->{0} sec] and deals M.DMG equal to [???->{1}%] of ATK. If the target is not a Hero, DEF Penetration is increased by 500.
Summons the Soul of Clear Blue Sky, Sherrkyle, dealing ??? M.DMG to all enemies and applying [Judgment Sigil] for 15sec. Afterwards, increases own Crit DMG by [100%->72%] for 11sec.

1.from: For the duration of Skill, reduces Cooldown of self's all Skills by 1 sec every sec.
1.to: For the duration, reduces cooldown of all own skills by 1 sec every 2 sec.
1.unified: For the duration, reduces cooldown of all own skills by 1 sec every [1 sec->2 sec].

2.from: For the duration of Skill, attacks a random enemy, dealing ??? M.DMG every 1 sec and marking Judgment Sigil for 15 sec. If the target is already marked, deals additional ??? M.DMG that ignores DEF.
2.to: For the duration, every 2 sec, attacks a random enemy, dealing 150% of ATK as M.DMG and applying [Judgment Sigil] for 15 sec. If the target already has [Judgment Sigil], removes it and deals an additional 300% of ATK as M.DMG. This additional DMG gains 500 increased DEF Penetration.
2.unified: For the duration, every [1 sec->2 sec], attacks a random enemy, dealing ??? M.DMG and applying [Judgment Sigil] for 15 sec. If the target already has [Judgment Sigil], [removes it and deals additional ??? M.DMG that ignores DEF->removes it and deals an additional ??? as M.DMG. This additional DMG gains 500 increased DEF Penetration].
